commands.purpose: Dump the EntityRegistry. Without arguments — lists every registered entity (importable / exportable / sample-data flags + label + formats + permissions). With `entity` — full detail for one entity including every #[ImportField] / #[ExportField] / #[TransferField]. `--refresh-cache` rebuilds the cache from source. `--json` emits machine-parseable output.

CLI import. Behaves identically to the HTTP endpoint (creates an xfer_job, queues the chain, notifies on completion) unless `--sync` is set (runs synchronously in the current process for scripts + CI). `--dry-run` validates without persisting. `--as` impersonates a target user (initiator = that user). `--no-notify` suppresses the completion notification even if channels are configured.

CLI export. Same shape as `transfer:import` — creates an xfer_job, rides the queue chain, notifies on completion. `--filter` and `--include` accept spatie/laravel-query-builder grammar. `--sync` streams to stdout when format is CSV / JSON (useful for pipelines).

Generate sample records for a #[SampleData]-annotated entity. Same queue / notify lifecycle as import + export. Development + testing utility — the SampleCommand refuses to run in production unless `--force` is provided (guardrail against accidental invocation).
List xfer_jobs — platform-admin observability. Filter by status / kind / entity / tenant. `--json` for scripting.

Cancel a queued or running xfer_job. Sets status=cancelling; the next shard boundary bails out. `--force` cancels even a job in a terminal state (mutates status to cancelled and preserves cancel_reason — platform-admin only, audit-heavy).
Dispatch PruneXferArtifactsJob with the given scope. `--dry-run` reports counts without deleting. Individual pass flags (`--stale-only` etc.) let ops narrow the scope during incident response.

Diagnose an xfer_job. `--check-artifacts` re-computes SHA-256 of each artifact file on disk against XferArtifact.checksum_sha256; reports mismatches. `--check-shards` verifies every shard counters row matches when summed against the parent XferJob.counters.
